entry.title: CPI with PostgreSQL
entry.content:
Hello All,😎

What is in this blog?

In this blog, I am going to show how to insert multiple records into the PostgreSQL database from CPI using the JDBC driver. Most of the blogs I have seen in the SAP community use Microsoft SQL Server. That's why I chose another database.

The flow will be

  1. Postman will call the CPI rest-based web service with a JSON payload.
  2. The Groovy script modifies the JSON payload into the appropriate query format required for PostgreSQL.
  3. CPI will establish the connection with PostgreSQL and insert the records.

PostgreSQL Setup

I am using PostgreSQL 15.

I will not be explaining in depth; if you have any queries, let me know. I am glad to clear the query.

Table

Function Code

 

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_data(
	inp input[])
    RETURNS boolean
    LANGUAGE 'plpgsql'
    COST 100
    VOLATILE PARALLEL UNSAFE
AS $BODY$
declare
in_1 input;
begin
foreach in_1 in array inp
loop
  INSERT into public."EMPLOYEE"(empid,empname)
  VALUES("in_1".i_empid,"in_1".i_empname);
end loop;

RETURN TRUE;

end;
$BODY$;

 

(If there is a duplicate key, none of the records are inserted )

Record Insertion

Record Insertion Failure Case

Cloud Connector Setup:

The Database is running on my local machine port 5432. We have to use TCP protocol to connect with database.

 CPI Setup:

JDBC Setup

1.Upload JDBC Driver (Use the same version 8.2.2 driver; I got stuck in an error for two days and found that the reason is that I am using the 8.4 version driver 😐)

 

2. Create a JDBC data source (you have to use a virtual host and port in the JDBC URL; CPI_TEST is the database name).

 I-flow Development

1. Groovy Script to Convert JSON Format into an Appropriate Query Format

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.json.*;

def Message processData(Message message) {
// Delcaration
 def jsonSlurper = new JsonSlurper();
 def first_time = 'X'
def query = "SELECT public.create_data(ARRAY["
 //Get Body
 def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;
 // Parse Json
 json_obj = jsonSlurper.parseText(body);
 json_obj = json_obj.employee_details;
 //Loop Json Array and construct the string
 for(item in json_obj){
    if(first_time == 'X')
    {
            query = query + "("+item.employee_id+","+ "'"+item.employee_name+"')"
    }
    else
    {
      query = query + ",("+item.employee_id+","+ "'"+item.employee_name+"')"

    }
    first_time = ''
   
}
query = query + "]::input[])"

 message.setBody(query);
   
    return message;
}

 

Here is the attached image showing how this code transforms JSON into a query.

2. Connect to the database and insert records.

  I-flow Output

 

 

 

Conclusion:

In this blog, I show how to connect to the PostgreSQL database and insert the records. In the same way, you can read, modify, and delete.  This blog is purely created for learning purposes. If you are doing it for a real-time PostgreSQL database, ensure you are following adhered-to standards and practices.

Thanks. If you have any queries, comments, or feedback, kindly comment.

entry.title: Sales Order ATP for multiple orders with available inventory
entry.content:
Appreciate your help  and insights on this issue. I've set the scope for the sales order check (Rule A) to consider only available stock and exclude other supplies like purchase orders (POs) and production orders. However, the ATP (Available-to-Promise) check isn't aligning with our business requirements (Attached for quick reference) . Let me illustrate with a hypothetical scenario:

Let us say Currently, there are 10 units available in unrestricted inventory. If I create two or more sales orders with today's date as first date in the sales order and each order for a quantity of 10 or more, all orders are confirmed for 10 units, and the remaining quantity is based on the Replenishment Lead Time (RLT) from the material master.

After executing transactions V_V2 and V_V1, no recommendations are being generated. Our expectation is that once sales order 1 is confirmed for 10 units, subsequent orders should be discarded for the available inventory of 10 , and ATP should be recalculated based on the Replenishment Lead Time.

entry.title: Re: Possible to define EntitySet's name within CDS?
entry.content:
Hello,

I've been searching for a solution lately on this very topic, without any success. Searched the documentation and forums, but no luck yet. Anyone knows if this is still not supported?

Thank you!

Rafael

entry.title: Re: How can an independent consultant purchase a new 'red...
entry.content: I attempted to purchase SAP Learning Hub subscription as an individual on June 20, 2024 and have been in a feedback loop with SAP as to why my order was not being processed, i.e., I was not receiving emails with instance / log-in credentials. I had to escalate to SAP Sales and received an email from SAP Support Admin today that it is not possible to purchase as an individual. The representative cited my use of a gmail address on the order as an issue. My question is, can I purchase a Learning Hub Subscription as an individual using my company email address, but pay for it with my personal credit card.

entry.title: Re: F110 Aggregation of open items after editing proposal
entry.content:
As you can see on the message you are receiving on the payment:

I could simulate same behavior in my system and the main reason is because the Customer Open Item don´t have the Payment Term defined... because of that, the F110 does know where to aggregate that open. Check below, I replicate your issue having 1 customer open item with PM "U" defined and other without PM "U":

When running F110 and editing propostal the item with PM defined have the aggregate function automatically as you expect:

 

 

While the other, because of missing PM shows the same error message you received:

 

Try to set the payment term in the Customer Open Item and check the aggregation behaviour.

 

BR,

 

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: How to access fields from structure in adobe form through javascript code
entry.content: Where is "FKART" in relation to "this" within the subform hierarchy of your layout?

entry.title: Re: SAP-GUI connection encryption and Single Sign-On based on SSL certificates
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for the detailed steps in the video. 

The SNC Lock gets activated when SNC/enable is set to 1 and does not consider the value of snc/data_protection/max, snc/data_protection/min, or snc/data_protection/use.

Is there any other way to validate the encrypted communication between SAP GUI and the server?

Nipun

entry.title: Editable virtual elements
entry.content:
Hello Together,

In my RAP application I defined a virtual element to display and edit standard text (read by READ_TEXT function module )

Then I extended in with Annotation @ui.multilineEdit:true.

For some reason @ui.multilineEdit:true has no effect and virtual element is still displayed as common text in edit mode.
(@UI.multilineEdit:true works perfectly with other fields, coming directly from CDS)

Is there are any way to make virtual element editable?

I'm working on S4HANA 2023.  

@Andre_Fischer

I have already left a comment on a similar topic (26.06.2024):
 How to implement a custom entity in the ABAP RESTf... - Page 2 - SAP Community

Ivan

entry.title: Re: Estorno dos lançamentos contábeis que a CK40N gerou -...
entry.content:
Olá, 

Não sei exatamente seu cenário, mas você deve utilizar o Material Ledger para calculo do preço real. Seguinte, quando existe um calculo de custo standard(CK40N), os materiais com controle de preço S - Standard price sofrem a revalorização com isso da maneira que você compartilhou abaixo.

Muito provavelmente o lançamento realizado pela CK40N lançou em seu inventário(OBYC BSX - Inventory posting) contra a conta de Ganho e Perda por revalorização definida na OBYC pela transaction UMB Gain/loss from revaluation.

Você tem algumas opções para lhe dar com isso:

1) Aguardar o fechamento do mês corrente, o custo real calculado pelo ML irá revalorizar seu estoque e você pode executar um novo calculo de custo standard via CK40N agora de forma correta.

2) Se precisa acertar isso dentro do mês, a única opção é utilizar a MR22 - Debit/Credit Material acertando seu valor de estoque. Porém você irá precisar parametrizar um Revaluation Reason na MR22 que compense os lançamentos que a CK40N... seria a inversão das contas BSX/UMB.

 

Esperto ter ajudado.

 

Att,

 

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: How to list Hana tenant databases in a query?
entry.content:
One query can give you both SDB and Tenant info:

 

select * from "SYS_DATABASES"."M_SERVICES"

entry.title: Re: Trial and Pricing Strategy - SAP CX AI toolkit
entry.content:
Hello @sarbajeet,

Please note that SAP does not provide a trial for the SAP CX AI Toolkit.

While, as a SAP partner, you can request TDD for SAP CX AI Toolkit.

  • with TDD, you'll get 50 AI Units/month
  • the cost is cheaper and you can check in the SAP Pricing App.

🔰 Please don't miss to 𝗦𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝘂𝗽 for a live demo of CX AI toolkit on 03 July: https://imsap.co/6040g6Vsu

I hope this answers your query to close the thread.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

purchase requisition date mismatch in apo and ecc - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Unable to get login page in backoffice in hybris 2211
entry.content:
It could be due to broken UI which can be set by f4 config reset. Other reason could be long running db call.

Rootcause will be more clear with threaddumps.

entry.title: Re: Replication of Quotations from 3rd part systems to SA...
entry.content:
Hello @Hemanthbatchu,

There can be multiple options to achieve this based on your system landscape:

(1) SAP CPQ in landscape

  • You can use the OOTB functionality to send emails after the Quote is generated in SAP CPQ.

(2) SAP CDP in landscape integration with Salesforce

  • You can integrate Salesforce and Emarsys with SAP CDP (central data system for both profile and activities)
  • Once you have received the event from Salesforce to CDP, the CDP CX Flow can trigger the emails from Emarsys.

(3) Using the Emarsys External Events

  • Under the menu Management > External Events, you can configure the events to be captured and trigger-based email campaigns triggered based on these events.
  • Read the help document for how to - https://help.emarsys.com/hc/en-us/articles/360010574114-Events-External-events

I hope this answers your query.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

entry.title: Re: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException/Conne...
entry.content: attach the full error logs, there should be area "caused by" in error logs. Usually its due to long running query.

entry.title: Re: Unable to find the option Write a blog
entry.content: Choose a product, technology or group > something "Blog"... > Create

entry.title: Re: Start service / cronjob once after server start
entry.content: There is a property named cronjob.timertask.loadonstartup which should be set to true via HAC on your backgroundprocessing. After setting this, you would be able to see cronjobs getting triggered as per the schedule

entry.title: Re: Adding/Modifying MRP Controller in APO
entry.content: Is it possible to make this modification directly in the production environment? Or create a transaction so that this modification can be made in bulk? Maybe a program that updates the data in table: T024D?

entry.title: How to Enable App-to-App Navigation in BAS?
entry.content:
I have 2 Fiori Applications developed in BAS with navigation and I want to test the navigation in BAS with sandbox FLP but it doesn't work.

At the beginning, the Navigation didn't work and I got the error that the navigation is not supported. I followed this blog and now I don't get the error anymore. However, the navigation still doesn't work. In debugging, I see this following coding:

var aIntents = { target: {semanticObject: "SemanticX", 
                         action: "manage"},
                params: {Par1: "X",
                         Par2: "Y"};    
                sap.ushell.Container.getServiceAsync("CrossApplicationNavigation").then( function (oCrossAppNav) {                         
                        oCrossAppNav.isNavigationSupported([aIntents]).done(function(aResponses) 
                        { 
            // do something
});
});

 

The oCrossAppNav.isNavigationSupported([aIntents]) return false back and I don't know why.

If I test the same coding in a embedded Fiori Launchpad with a Dev System -> Then the navigation works.

Do you have any ideas what I'm missing in this case?

Thanks and best regards,

TOn

entry.title: Re: MRBR won't release invoice with manual block when cal...
entry.content:
Hello,

When you recording a BDC for MRBR transaction, I think you have not selected the invoice line items from displayed list that you wish to unblock from report.

if you selected these line items, you will see additional fields in recording like 

BDC_CURSOR 04/03
BDC_OKCODE =&ALL

BDC_CURSOR 04/03
BDC_OKCODE =FREI

BDC_CURSOR 04/03
BDC_OKCODE =STRG-S

Along with your already inserted fields ; - 

PA_XMANU X
PA_XSPGR
PA_ZLSPR X

- try creating another recording for MRBR ; and when the report shows the list of invoices;

instead of selecting the checkboxes manually;

try selecting all the invoices from Menu bar -> Edit -> Select All -> and Now, you can see all your invoices are selected ; click on Release Icon; these steps will be recorded in your BDC;

TIP - Since you posted all your manual blocked invoices; there will be NO data available; you may create a New one and try with Newly recorded screen.

Hope this will solve your issue.

Best Regards,

Sandeep Kumar

Regards

entry.title: SAP Fiori tools 2406 update includes added support for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and more
entry.content:
We are excited to announce expanded support for SAP S/4HANA Cloud within SAP Fiori tools. Developers can now seamlessly create and deploy applications to SAP S/4HANA Cloud directly from Visual Studio Code. While this was already possible using SAP Business Application Studio where SAML authentication is supported, I am happy that we can now offer an alternative to those who have a requirement to work in Visual Studio Code.  

While a comprehensive OAuth solution is still in development, a provisional solution based on reentrance tickets is available to meet immediate development needs for SAP S/4HANA Cloud applications. You will need to manually enter the username and password to the system. To make it easier for you, we have enhanced the feature to also support adding a new connection via reentrance ticket. Your username and password are saved in your laptop (Keychain for Mac users and Credential Manager for Windows users), and you can simply select the system as the OData source during project generation.

Adding connection info as an SAP System

Choose the SAP System when selecting the OData Source

More Integrated Development Experience

The integration between SAP Fiori tools and ABAP Development Tools (ADT) has been significantly enhanced, enabling developers to transition seamlessly from ABAP to SAP Fiori development environments as described in Ian’s blog. This collaboration facilitates smoother development and brings all the SAP Fiori development tooling closer together. Future updates promise further innovations, including the upcoming ability to create UI services directly from SAP Fiori tools, reinforcing the commitment to a unified development experience across SAP ecosystems.

Launching SAP Fiori tools Application Generator from ADT

Simplification and Continuous Enhancements

In the realm of app development, the UI5 Language Assistant now streamlines navigation by offering direct links to controller files from XML views and fragments. Furthermore, the ability to automate the update of manifest schema on demand enhances agility in development workflows. We have also added UI5 linter integration enabling you to check compatibility of your project with SAPUI5 version 2 so you can proactively check your app for upgrade. To start the UI5 linter check, click on the “Run UI5 Linter” tile in the Application Info page, or execute command “Fiori: Run UI5 Linter” from the command palette.

“Run UI5 Linter” tile in the Application Info page

On the user experience front, we introduced a toggle in the page editor so you can decide whether you prefer the more Visual Studio Code native experience where all properties are scrollable within a page (the default), or you prefer to see only the relevant properties for the selected element (disable the “Scrolling Properties” in Page Editor. We would love to hear your thoughts so we can further improve.  

Disable “Scrolling Properties” to see only the properties relevant to the selected element

Open Source Journey Continues

Since the start of our open source journey, we have published 60 packages to open-ux-tools repo. Most recently, SAP Fiori tools completed the open sourcing of key modules, such as the preview middleware, the OData client modules and some annotation-related APIs. I am especially excited about the preview middleware which paves the way to virtualize most of the files required for local testing which in turn will reduce and simplify the future project structure of the SAP Fiori apps. The open source initiative not only fosters transparency but also encourages collaboration and innovation within the SAP developer community. As an example, we are working to consolidate and simplify the tooling for Adaptation Project with the open source modules. Looking ahead, plans are underway to open source the SAP Fiori generator and the complete annotation API, further empowering developers and enhancing interoperability with other development tools.

Outlook: Towards Future Innovations

Looking towards the future, SAP Fiori tools remains dedicated to advancing developer productivity and creativity. The introduction of Gen AI capabilities through SAP Build Code marks a significant milestone, enabling developers to generate projects directly from business requirement documents. Building upon this foundation, upcoming enhancements will extend these capabilities to include project generation from screenshots and the ability to generate RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model) services, promising even greater automation and efficiency in application development.

In conclusion, the latest updates to SAP Fiori tools underscore SAP's commitment to empowering developers with robust tools and integrations, fostering innovation and efficiency in the development of SAP Fiori . As these capabilities continue to evolve, developers can expect further enhancements aimed at simplifying development workflows, enhancing integration, and driving forward the future of SAP Fiori app development. Stay tuned for more updates and join us in shaping the future of enterprise application development with SAP Fiori tools. Send us an email at sapfiorielements@sap.com or join us in the next monthly SAP Fiori roundtable!

To see these innovations in person, I encourage you to join us in Chicago for our next SAP Fiori Innovation Day on August 13, 2024.

entry.title: Re: unable to load javascript via cmsparagraph component...
entry.content:
Greeting!

On newer versions of SAP Commerce, the Paragraph component has a checking for checking unsafe Javascript:

Paragraph Component

To enable Javascript on CMS you have to enable the flag: cms.components.allowUnsafeJavaScript

It's disabled by default.

Best Regards, Sassá

entry.title: integrate SAP Analytics Cloud into MDK
entry.content:

I am looking for some video/course/documentation that will allow me to implement SAP Analytics Cloud in a MKD application.
At the moment I have created an MDK application, but I don't know about Analytics Cloud and I want to create something to show in the application.
Does anyone know if this is possible? As I understand it is possible, but I did not find any video that shows me how to do it.
Thank you very much!

entry.title: How to work with Additive Costs in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We would like to understand how to use additive costs in S/4HANA Public Cloud, app CK74N.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to work with Additive Costs in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


You use additive costing to add costs manually to a material cost estimate when they cannot be calculated by the system. Examples of such costs are freight charges, insurance costs, stock transfer costs, incomplete or changed BOMs, and routings.


As a rule, costing calculates the costs of a material on the basis of the quantity structure. This type of cost estimate is performed automatically by the system. However, you can also manually enter estimated values for costs that cannot be calculated by the system. This allows you to add costs to a cost estimate that was calculated automatically.


The main prerequisite for including additive costs in an automatic cost estimate is that you carry out both automatic and additive costing on the basis of the same costing variant and costing version.


For the full details of this functionality and how to configure it, please refer to the documentation in the SAP Help Portal Documentation:

Additive Costs
Create Additive Costs


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Commerce Cloud V2 IP Range

entry.title: How to Plan Data for Activity Types?

entry.title: Re: How to Plan Data for Activity Types?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


You can use the app "Manage Cost Rates - Plan" to plan cost rates for activities. Kindly refer to the Fiori Library and SAP Help Portal documentation below:

Manage Cost Rates - Plan (Fiori Library)
Manage Cost Rates - Plan (SAP Help Portal)


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to access fields from structure in adobe form thr...
entry.content:
I'm not aware of the ability to read values from the context unless they are bound to the layout.  An easy way to allow for reading the value is to drop the field into the layout and set it to hidden.  The example from the screenshot I have supplied would be referred by data.DesignView.FKART.rawValue.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Post S/4 2023 upgrade, TM Cockpit does not show truck...
entry.content: Hey, Did you get answer of your above query. I am also facing similar issue, so wanted to check with you. Thanks

entry.title: Creating a story with Dymanic Version & Date Combinations
entry.content:
Introduction

 

Designing a story in SAP Analytics Cloud can be easy and straightforward with many features to create calculations, columns, styles. The drag and drop functionality helps users create reports with different layouts of various complexity . Optimized story design is also helpful to create advanced stories and reporting layouts using JavaScript to achieve complex functionality and user interactions.

When designing any report or input form, if the layout contains Version and Date dimensions, adding multiple members of versions and Months or Years can result in a Layout that has columns with all the combinations of the members. For example, if the selections contain Actual, Budget for Version and Date contains years 2024 and 2025, the report will have 4 columns. Even though the intention is to show only 2 columns with combinations of [Actual, 2023] and [Budget, 2024], the final report contains all 4 combinations.

There are ways in which we can show only valid/required combinations, for example hiding unwanted columns or suppress columns with no data or using Advanced Filters. But these approaches are not dynamic. Every time there is a change in Version or Date, the columns need to be adjusted manually. It might also create many static reports to achieve different combination reports.

The alternate approach is to create dynamic reports is using Optimized story design using JavaScript and SAC Advanced Script API to show columns with only valid/required combinations. This blog provides required design and logic required for interactions and filtering.
 

Step 1 - Creating Design Elements

The design of the dashboard uses dropdown menus instead of filters define within Story. The user can select required Dimension members from dropdown and on submit the selections will be sent to the table filters dynamically. We will use story calculations to create required combinations and further use SAC Analytics designer and API to update dimension filters with required combinations.

Step 1-a
  • Create a New story using Optimized Story design.
  • Add 4 Dropdown menus ( Insert -> Filters/Controls -> Dropdown). 2 for Actual / 2023 and 2 for Budget/ 2024. 
  • Dropdown names dd_fy1, dd_fy2 for years & dd_cat1, dd_cat2 for versions. 
  • Add 1 submit button ( Insert -> Button )
  • Button name : btn_1
  • Add 1 Table and connect to model. Add necessary filters. ( We need to update the filters at a later stage to show necessary columns)
  • Table Name: table_1

 

Step 1-b
Once the dropdown menus are added, from the script edit page, add the values required for the dropdown menus. Year dropdown has values as Years and Version dropdown has values as Version names. Below images show the options used for each dropdown.
 
 
 
 
The final result will be 4 dropdown menus with values and a Submit button. 
 

 

Step 2 - Logic 

Till now we have added design elements in the Story. Now we need to add logic to capture the values selected from dropdown menus and send them story filters.

logic to be added on btn_1 onClick function

The logic has 3 main parts. 

  1. extract the selections used from the dropdown menus and pass them to variables and arrays
  2. create valid combinations by combining Version + year values and push into array
  3. Filter the Version, Year and Valid Combinations values on the table

 

 

 

//extract selected versions into variables 
var version1 = dd_cat1.getSelectedKey(); 
var version2 = dd_cat2.getSelectedKey(); 

// append public to variables created above 
var col1_version = "public."+version1; 
var col2_version = "public."+version2; 

//extract selected versions into variables 
var col1_fy = dd_fy1.getSelectedKey(); 
var col2_fy = dd_fy2.getSelectedKey(); 

// save table into variable 
var ds_table1 = table_1.getDataSource(); 

// get dimension names into variables. Note the order of dimensions added in columns. 
// 0 is version, 1 is for year 
var version_col =table_1.getDimensionsOnColumns()[0]; 
var fy_col =table_1.getDimensionsOnColumns()[1]; 

// create an empty array to hold version values and add the version variables created above 
var version_cols_values = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string); 
version_cols_values.push(col1_version); 
version_cols_values.push(col2_version); 

// create an empty array to hold year values and add the year variables created above 
var fy_cols_values = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string); 
fy_cols_values.push(col1_fy); 
fy_cols_values.push(col2_fy); 

// create an empty array for valid combinations 
// for example Actual2023, Budget2024 
var valid_comb = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string); 
valid_comb.push(version1+col1_fy); 
valid_comb.push(version2+col2_fy); 


// set the 3 dimension filters for Version, Date, valid_combinations on the table 
ds_table1.setDimensionFilter(version_col,version_cols_values); 
ds_table1.setDimensionFilter(fy_col,fy_cols_values); 

ds_table1.setDimensionFilter(table_1.getDimensionsOnColumns()[2],valid_comb);

 

 

 

Step 3 - Story

The JavaScript logic above filters the dimension values for Version and Time , Fiscal Year values. But filtering alone on Version and Time still result in additional columns which are not required. So we need to create an additional calculated dimension call "valid_combinations" to identify the required columns and filter them during the runtime.

 

 

Below is the code used for creating the calculated dimension. The code uses Version and Fiscal Year to derive the all the possible combinations of columns. One can add many versions, years and create all past and future values possible.

 

 

 

IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Actual" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2022"),
        "Actual2022",
        IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Actual" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2023"),
                "Actual2023",
                IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Actual" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2024"),
                        "Actual2024",
                        IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Actual" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2025"),
                                "Actual2025",
                                IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Budget" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2022"),
                                        "Budget2022",
                                        IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Budget" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2023"),
                                                "Budget2023",
                                                IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Budget" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2024"),
                                                        "Budget2024",
                                                        IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Budget" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2025"),
                                                                "Budget2025",
                                                                IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Plan" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2022"),
                                                                        "Plan2022",
                                                                        IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Plan" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2023"),
                                                                                "Plan2023",
                                                                                IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Plan" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2024"),
                                                                                        "Plan2024",
                                                                                        IF(([d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Version].[p/ID]="public.Plan" and [d/"PLANNING_MODEL_SAC":Time].[p/FISCAL_YEAR]="2025"),
                                                                                                "Plan2025",
                                                                                                "Actual2025"
                                                                                        )
                                                                                )
                                                                        )
                                                                )
                                                        )
                                                )
                                        )
                                )
                        )
                )
        )
)

 

 

 

Result

The final result will contain table with only required columns.

entry.title: Costing variant PPC4 is not available in configuration
entry.content:
Costing Variant PPC4 is not available in CBC configuration, even though we can check it in sale order costing.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Costing variant PPC4 is not available in configuration
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


There is no specific app/activity to configure Sales Costing Variant PPC4, but you can check the parameters assigned to the related Valuation Variant (Costing Variant PPC4 is assigned with Valuation Variant 001).


To configure Valuation Variants, you can use Configuration Activity / SSCUI "Define Valuation Variants per Plant".


You can also refer to the below KBA:

3350673 - How to check Costing/Valuation Variants for Sales Costing


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Loading SAP S/4 HANA Exchange Rates from OANDA Foreign Exchange Rate API through CPI integration
entry.content: How to connect to CPI in Transacational RFC ? what shoudl be the progarm ID in the sm59.as we know we can connect only type G for CPI

entry.title: Error 'First create the valuation-type-independent data for' when using Product Migration Object
entry.content:
We are maintain the valuation category in product master creation template and trying to mass upload with valuation type.

We are checking creation & extend template using to upload valuation type but output getting error  'First create the valuation-type-independent data for' PMD_MSG024

Why  ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error 'First create the valuation-type-independent da...
entry.content:
On the tab  "Valuation data" in the Product Template, you have to define one valuation header record with specified valuation category and initial valuation type and one dependent record for each valuation type.

 

Please check sample for Split Valuation available at the migration object Product Documentation

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 4 - Geospatial
entry.content:
I believe HANA is wrong, the shortest distance between Paris and Beauvais is to take bicycle and not plane 😊
In addition, It's a good warm-up before participating in the Olympic Games.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - Convert Date from OData
entry.content:
Hello team,

 

Just for reference for other community members,

 

I have used below javascript code to convert the date to oData date format. 

I have fired the event once the date field is changed to call the Javascript and store it into different variable. 

const inputDateTime = inputs.input1;
const date = new Date(inputDateTime);;

// Step 2: Set the time to the start of the day
date.setUTCHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
// Step 3: Format the resulting date to the desired string format
const year = date.getUTCFullYear();
// because there is no less equal to operator in oData supported by JAVASCRIPT so need to -1 in From Date.
date.setUTCDate(date.getUTCDate() - 1);

const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); // Months are zero-based
const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');
const hours = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');
const minutes = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
const seconds = String(date.getUTCSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

var result1 = year + '-' + month + '-' + day + 'T' + hours + ':' + minutes + ':' + seconds ;
return{ result : result1 };

entry.title: SOX approved database access and security
entry.content: Hi. I am wondering if SAP has any advice/documentation on how to best implement/configure a database that is SOX ready/compliant. I am assuming that SAP has dealt with several audited costumers and maybe there is a "how to" document that I can refer to. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 4 - Geospatial
entry.content: I was thinking in somewhere where I can get lost for a while, away of meetings, etc. and surprisely the travel is not that complex!! Málaga (Spain) to Anchorage (Alaska) is just a couple of hops away.

entry.title: Re: How to set up public dimension for 2 company codes
entry.content:
Hi @TanyaSrivastava ,

You might have a look at dimension comment https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/b103a251020746f786ec0860fa51a63a/ee4c734f5c104f349009f176973273f7.html?state=DRAFT&q=dimension%20comment 

You can create dimension comment that record textual descriptions of dimension member combinations. For your case, you can create 2 different dimension comment for the combination of same profit center and 2 company codes.  

Sarau

entry.title: Analyze License Consumption Consolidated Data with the SAM4U Solution from SAP
entry.content:
Are you still paying for license analysis consultancy services that use their proprietary tools, marketed as miracle solutions? Forget about it! Now you can leverage an SAP solution that offers beautifully designed Fiori views to analyze user, engine, and even HANA Enterprise Edition license consumption.

Introducing SAM4U: The SAP Solution for License Analysis

Meet SAM4U, the innovative solution designed by SAP to streamline your license analysis. You can explore the demo version right from our website.

Today’s post is about consolidated data analysis and how you can create a consolidation corresponding to your measurement plan in just a few minutes.

When you install the SAM4U extractor to your backend system (read more about it in our previous blogs), you can start piping data to SAM4U, for instance, via a ZIPped file.

Pic. 01. Uploading ZIP File Produced by SAM4U Extractor

If you're uploading a file for the first time, it will also create system metadata from the extracted dataset. Each subsequent upload is grouped at the system level, allowing you to drill down and see all datasets you’ve uploaded:

 Pic. 02. Datasets Overview for a Certain System

Once you’ve uploaded data for all systems for your consolidation, navigate to the “Consolidation” view. Click the create button to join all the systems you’d like to consolidate. You can even add HANA EE systems, ensuring that HANA EE license consumption KPIs in the SAM4U tool are also populated:

Pic. 03. Creation of Consolidation

That’s it! You’ve done it yourself 😊 Now SAM4U KPIs are filled, and you can enjoy the detailed analysis of your license consumption. In our example, we noticed we're using more licenses than we're entitled to 😉

Pic. 04. Users’ Licenses Consumption Analysis

Install and enjoy the SAM4U tool, or get it hosted by us to keep your costs under control.

P.S. Check out our entire blog series about the SAM4U tool at this link: SAM4U as a Service.

entry.title: Re: RISE, with embedded set up
entry.content:
Hello Raj,

Please check your GRC deployment model as per SAP Note 2229853 - GRC and S/4HANA oP: compatibility information - SAP for Me. Refresh of GRC non-production is possible only in the side-by-side deployment scenarios. If co-deployment/embedded model is used, then S/4HANA and GRC would be on the same database and it is not possible to refresh just the GRC part using standard refresh procedures.

Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Execute Business Object Interface from action
entry.content:
Hi community,

A common request from customers is that a report execute a certain process and if one of the process "fail" not continue with the others process. In S/4HANA Public Cloud, the replacement for BAPI's are the Local APIs (Business Object Interfaces - BOI) for example I_MaterialDocumentTP. Only for reference, this example is obtained from the standard Knowledge Transfer Document. In theory, the REPORTED structure must return messages in case of an error occurs, but that is not the case.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_materialdocumenttp
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE FROM VALUE #( ( %cid                          = 'CID_001'
                                    goodsmovementcode             = '01'
                                    postingdate                   = '31129999'
                                    documentdate                  = '31129999'
                                    %control-goodsmovementcode                    = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-postingdate                          = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                    %control-documentdate                         = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                ) )
             ENTITY MaterialDocument
             CREATE BY \_MaterialDocumentItem
             FROM VALUE #( (
                             %cid_ref = 'CID_001'
                             %target = VALUE #( ( %cid                           = 'CID_ITM_001'
                                                  plant                          = '1010'
                                                  material                       = 'RAW_MATERIAL_01'
                                                  GoodsMovementType              = '501'
                                                  storagelocation                = '101A'
                                                  QuantityInEntryUnit            = 1
                                                  entryunit                      = 'ST'
                                                  %control-plant                 = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-material              = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-GoodsMovementType     = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-storagelocation       = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-QuantityInEntryUnit   = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                                  %control-entryunit             = cl_abap_behv=>flag_changed
                                              ) )

                                               
                         ) )
             MAPPED   DATA(ls_create_mapped)
             FAILED   DATA(ls_create_failed)
             REPORTED DATA(ls_create_reported).

 The "errors" only are obtained when the COMMIT ENTITIES in the REPORTED structure.

COMMIT ENTITIES
  RESPONSE OF i_materialdocumenttp
  FAILED DATA(commit_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(commit_reported).

 Of course, in the context of ABAP RAP, the use of COMMIT is not supported.

If I'm developing an application with ABAP RAP and I have an action that need to create a material document and report if an error occurs, who could I achieve that?

I know the existence of different methods of "asynchronous code execution" (app. jobs, bgPF and events), if this is the only way... what could be the best option to report/show to the user that material document is processing in background and when the process ends show the errors or the new document created?

entry.title: IIs it posible to develop plugins for SAP DM with the CAP project?
entry.content:
I am wondering if it is possible to develop a plugin for SAP Data Management (SAP DM) using the CAP (Cloud Application Programming) project.

Additionally, can SAP DM plugins only be deployed on Cloud Foundry, or can they also be deployed on Kyma-runtime?

entry.title: Re: Partial translation of Translation Hub in SEN
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

Sorry, no answer for this one.  I guess that the translation functionality has been tuned to not change the name of some SAP products but that's just a guess.  You can raise a ticket ot see if there is anything that can be done to obtain a better result but given that customers have not ability to adjust the standard translation - which is AI - then I'm not sure that anything at all is possible.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to Enable App-to-App Navigation in BAS?

make sure you maintained the correct semantic object and action.

entry.title: APP F110 ERROR (Company codes 557A/557A do not appear in proposal 27.06.2024 ASFG; correct)
Re: Post S/4 2023 upgrade, TM Cockpit does not show truck...
entry.content: Here is SAP response that fixed the problem: The standard association used for the display of the Truck Resource in the page layout is RESOURCE_ACTIVE_ROAD. With this association, we specifically read only those resources having the TRMODCAT as 'Road' alone and the resources having all other modes will be eliminated from getting displayed. If you intend to display other modes as well under this tab you may want to use the association RESOURCE_ACTIVE instead. In standard, for Air mode of transport, we anticipate only the schedule based Freight bookings/Freight order and not AVR based orders.

entry.title: Re: SOX approved database access and security
entry.content:
Hello,

Unsure if a complete guide exists for this purpose as the implementation would depend heavily on the database being used and organizational security/auditing policies/requirements. There are few best practices mentioned for HANA database in the link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/b3ee5778bc2e4a089d3299b82ec762a7/35eb4e567d53456088755b8131b7ed1d.html.

Perhaps this could help. You may need to look at security guides for individual database types for more information.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: after adding via SPRO, how can i make that field is auto filled ?
entry.content:
hi everyone,

i just add 2 new field(Contract Start and Contract End) in VA05 Header via

SPRO -> Sales Document Header -> Define Sales Document Types.

 

and as u can see its already showed up in VA05 Header : 

and now i want to make that 2 new field is auto filled just like Req. Delivery Date,Shipto Filed and Soldto Field rather than Blank like that.

can someone tell me how can i achieve that ? 

Note : im new in abap and please tell me if my question is not Clear enough so i can try to make it more Clear . Thanks All 🙂

entry.title: Tolerance check refer to PP （price variance） during invoice verification
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any possibility to check the tolerance of Accumulate Price variance instead of variance of each invoice refer to PP during invoice verification?  for example, we set amount upper threshold is 1000 in OMR6, refer to same PO item, there are two invoices, first invoice exceeds 600, it should be passed without be locked as the tolerance is acceptable, while if the secondary invoice is same, we would like to block the payment as the accumulated tolerance is 1200, over the threshold, so we would like to block the secondary invoice, is it possible? if yes, may we know how? thanks!

PO Line

PO Amount

Invoice Amount

Variance

Current Behavior

Expectation

1

10000

10600

600

Released due to variance is less than 10% and less than 1000 AUD

Released due to variance is less than 10% and less than 1000 AUD

2

10000

10600

600

Released due to variance is less than 10% and less than 1000 AUD

Should block due to variance is greater than 1000 AUD

entry.title: BP Master Data - 'ID No. 2' field is not editable for a specific user
entry.content:
Hi, 

The issue happen to this specific user, the user  has full authorization for business partner master data, however, the field ‘Company Reg No’ (original name of this field is 'ID No. 2') is not editable. This happen to all BP types, whether is Add or Update mode. There is no UI configuration in the BP master data.

I have tried login using this affected user, go to edit UI configuration, and tried 'Restore Default' UI, but no help.

Any idea?

Phoebe

entry.title: Need help in achieving below requirement to handle xml data in sap CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 
First let me thank all the people who are help people in this forum which is really helping people like to learn. I have learnt so much from your responses and blogs. Thanks you so much for all your efforts and time to guide people like me.
 
I have the below requirement to achieve in cpi. Please guide/help me to achieve this. I really appreciate your time and energy.
 
Below is the sample payload. I need to first for each <cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails> nodes, combine <cust_startDate>, only take date from this field, and take <cust_startTime>, only take time from this field. so first record the vlaue will be 2024-06-25T11:00:00.000. And then sort all the records based this newly combined value from low to high.
 
Then Take the 1st <cust_startTime>, take only Time part in this value, and add 4 hrs to that time and compare it with next records. If any of the next records falls under that 4 hrs time frame, then take <cust_endDate> of that record and <cust_endTime>, only the time part, of that record and the <cust_calloutType> as 0023. <cust_startDate> and <cust_startTime>, only time part, of the first record value.
 
After that, take next record which falls outside of 1st 4 hrs and then again check same logic as above. And then again, take next record which falls outside of 2nd, which falls outof 1st 4 hrs, and repeat the same steps.
 
So every time you create a new record, <cust_calloutType> value varies like for 1st record the vakue will be 1123 and for send record it's 1142 and next record it's 1143 and then next reocrd 1144 and the next record 1145 and the next record 1146
 
Below is the sample payload 
 
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
<externalCode>XyZ</externalCode>
        <effectiveStartDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</effectiveStartDate>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails1>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T11:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T11:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T17:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T14:30:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T13:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T12:30:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T00:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T20:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T18:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T18:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T10:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T03:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_endTime>1970-01-01T02:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_startTime>1970-01-01T01:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails1>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
 
And I need the output as Below
 
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
<externalCode>Xyz</externalCode>
        <effectiveStartDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</effectiveStartDate>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails1>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_startTime>11:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endTime>17:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1123</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-25T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_startTime>18:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endTime>00:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1142</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
<cust_startDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_startDate>
<cust_startTime>01:00:00.000</cust_startTime>
<cust_endTime>10:30:00.000</cust_endTime>
<cust_endDate>2024-06-26T00:00:00.000</cust_endDate>
<cust_calloutType>1143</cust_calloutType>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecordDetails1>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
</cust_MaximoCalloutRecords>
 
Attaching the payload requirements for easy understanding

entry.title: Re: Upload Financial Planning data from Excel to SAP PPM
entry.content: Hi, the above link is no more active. Is there an updated link for the same?

entry.title: Re: ERROR could not build the "sapcapirebook" module
entry.content: Yes, I have executed 'npm install'. And then 'npm run mta-build'

entry.title: SAP HANA Topology match for System Copy
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We are planning to execute system copy of our SAP PERSON_NAME system from production database, which is on SAP PERSON_NAME 2.0 SP05 Rev 55

Source system server is at 780 GB memory and the maximum memory utilized is 500 GB.
Target system server is at 250 GB memory.

Backup size of source system is 198 GB and backup size of target system backup size is at 98 GB.
Do we need to upgrade the target system memory to match the source system, before the system copy is executed.?

Kindly advise.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Topology match for System Copy
entry.content:
Dear customer,

For your concern, I would like to suggest that you refer to the admin guide "Prerequisites for Copying a Database Using Backup and Recovery".
Regarding to the memory and disk size of the source and target system, the target system should have the sufficient disk and memory resource.
Please refer to the admin guide 'Prerequisites for the Target Database'.
"The target database has sufficient disk space and memory.
The target system should have at least the same amount of disk space as the source system."

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to take advantage of new browser security processes with SAP Customer Data Cloud
entry.content: Recording link has expired/discontinued, is it possible to share the updated link

entry.title: Re: Help with Creating a new form template- Performance
entry.content:
@MichelleWest 

In form template setting you upload the XML and create the Template,also you can go to Manage Template and save as the existing Template and then can Modify accordingly ,Hope it helps and please mark it as answer if this helps so other can get benefit.

Steps to create form using Manage Template

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2076686 

Form Template settings details

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/E/2077413

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Phemex Einladungscode: HMXFT5 – Erhalten Sie einen Handelsbonus von 8.800 USDT
entry.content:
Suchen Sie nach einem Phemex Einladungscode? Für 2024 lautet er "HMXFT5". Registrieren Sie sich bei Phemex.com mit dem Code "HMXFT5", um einen Handelsbonus von 8.800 USDT und 50 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren zu erhalten.

 

KryptowährungsbörsePhemex
Phemex EinladungscodeHMXFT5
Rabatt auf HandelsgebührBis zu 50 %
Willkommensbonus8.800 USDT Bonus
Rabatt und Bonus100 % lebenslanger Rabatt und 8.800 USDT Bonus

Neue Benutzer verwenden den Phemex Einladungscode "HMXFT5", um Folgendes zu erhalten:
- 8.800 USDT Handelsbonus
- 5100 Phemex-Token

Der Bonus von 8.800 USDT kann Handelsgebühren abdecken oder Verluste sowohl auf Spot- als auch auf Futures-Märkten ausgleichen. Die 5100 Phemex Token bieten Staking-Möglichkeiten, vePT-Einnahmen, Rabatte auf Handelsgebühren und mehr.

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: Re: Overall cash Position check - Cash flow Analyzer App...
entry.content:
@VenuKudupudi Thanks for your question! Based on the information you provided, I think the problem may have something to do with the bank account derivation and the linking of the G/L account to the house bank account.

To resolve this, I think the first thing to check is whether the G/L account has been correctly linked to the house bank account of the bank account. This step is crucial in ensuring accurate balance display. For more information, see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/ac319d8fa4ea4624b40a58d23e3c4627/579e2d551c03bc06e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US.

If the issue persists, I recommend logging a support incident because troubleshooting without detailed product and system information can be challenging. Our support team will be happy to assist you further.
